hypothesis: If articles are preprocessed into structured markdown with preserved layout and image captions and then processed by a single-agent pipeline using multimodal LLMs with domain-specific prompts, then end-to-end chemical information extraction performance (precision, recall, and F1) will exceed that of baseline LLMs, a general-purpose ChatGPT agent, and existing domain-specific multi-agent systems because structured inputs and integrated multimodal handling reduce information loss and prompt complexity.
